title: The Flying Friends of Strawberry Island
summary: Dimetar, a young flying dragonet, enjoys a busy day at school on Circular Island. After a lunch of fish crackers and a restful nap with his purple cat stuffie, Sanina, he heads outside for playground time. While his other friends are grounded, he meets Zudy, a red and green dragonet visiting from Strawberry Island. The two take to the skies for a dizzying aerial display before their mothers, Allego and Demora, meet to arrange a cross-island playdate.

highlightQuote.text: Red and green, just like a strawberry.

transcript.text: Dinosaur story. Alexander says, I'm going to sit with Jane.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And who am I going to sit with, says Dimetar?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ginger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hi Ginger. What do you have for your snack today, Ginger?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Kibble.
Oh, that's not my favorite thing. Well, said Dimetar, did you bring a lunch box?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: I did today, I didn't forget this time. It's got fish crackers, a fish sandwich, some fish juice, and fish sauce.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Are you ready to eat? Put away your lunch box and zip it closed.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Thank you for the food we eat, thank you for the little birds that sing, thank you for everything.
I'm done. Burp!
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Raise your hand if you're done.
I'll raise my wing. Now what happens?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: The teacher comes over and says, what you need Dimetar?
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: I guess I could use a napkin or something, please.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Ginger passed out the napkins. Now put your lunch box away and put in your containers.
Can you please get your nap bag and your mat? There is mat time at school.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Get your nap bag and your stuffie. It is a stuffie of a cat, and its name is Sanina.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Sanina, so soft and snuggly. Dimetar lays down on his mat and gets cozy.
The teacher covers him with his blanket with dragons.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And then it's nap time, and then circle time, and then outside time!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Yay, outside time! I'm excited to fly. Does anyone want to fly with me? Can you fly, Jane or Alexander or Ginger?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No, none of us have wings.
Then a little voice called, I am Zudy Dragon, I've got wings!
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Wow, you must be a dragonet like me. Where do you live? I don't think you live on Circular Island.
I live on Strawberry Island. Every day I go there to pick strawberries for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: What color dragonet is Zudy Dragon?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Red and green, just like a strawberry.
They zoomed into the air! They zoomed this way and that way, and the teacher said, wow, that is making me dizzy.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe a bit more slow.
Here comes Zudy and Dimetar's moms.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Izzy
transcript.text: My name is Allego, Zudy's mom.
And Dimetar's mom's name is Demora. We live on Circular Island. What island does your family live on?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Strawberry Island.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Do you think we could come over sometime for a playdate?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Of course.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: A poised driver and student at Ginger Catasorry, this feline friend to Dimetar and Scratch Cat manages a digital Tamagotchi empire from the confines of a lunchbox. After recently representing Silver during the playdate, their steady paw was led far from the morning commute into the treacherous depths of the dark forest, where they navigated the shadows alongside Jane.

characters.name: Jane
characters.description: Dimetar’s matronly childhood companion is a kindhearted cat and daring ship’s pilot, a friend to Finn, Isabella, and Scratch Cat who navigates the expedition toward Mouse Castle and the road to Cadasori. Her cockpit is a warm sanctuary distinguished by a "love you" sticker and a cabin teeming with whiskered passengers, reflecting the same tenderness she first offered Silver. Though she maintains a bold pace, she is easily swayed by snacks at Seeker’s house or waylaid within the tangled depths of the dark forest. An adventurous spirit with whimsical desires, she currently dreams of a special little hat adorned with rainbow feathers, glitter, and a miniature fishy pond to crown her nautical ensemble.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: A soft, round, and silver-coated feline, this exceptionally fluffy educator is one of Minnie and Mickey’s own kittens grown into a figure of quiet authority. Known for daintily distributing napkins with velvet paws and commuting to school behind the wheel, the gray-furred teacher balances his role on Nana’s welcoming committee with a life of polite, helpful service. Whether presiding over his humble sanctuary—the very cage Seeker once coveted—or sustaining himself on crunchy kibble and savory wet food, he remains a steady presence, most recently seen trading his classroom duties for the shadows of a secret closet hideout alongside Garfield.

characters.name: The Teacher
characters.description: The educator at Dimetar's school who watches the children play and gets dizzy from the dragons' flying.

characters.name: Sanina
characters.description: Dimetar's soft, purple cat stuffie used for nap time.

characters.name: Zudy Dragon
characters.description: A red and green dragonet from Strawberry Island who meets Dimetar on the playground.

places.name: Circular Island
places.description: A perfectly circular landmass rising from the waters of the distant reaches, this remote sanctuary serves as both the private residence of Dimitar and the hallowed grounds of the school.

places.name: Strawberry Island
places.description: The home of Zudy Dragon, known for having strawberries for every meal.

places.name: The School Playground
places.description: The place where Dimetar and Zudy first meet and fly together.
